meta.question: In this model, is the 'Buch in Warenkorb' task always reachable from the start node? (Model ID: 4e8df28e6d9f4afe970d06522542e830)
meta.finalAnswer: Yes, the 'Buch in Warenkorb' task is reachable from the start node in the model with ID 4e8df28e6d9f4afe970d06522542e830. A path exists from the start event (URI: https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-7A310B93-7314-4BBC-86D7-667A0A9B4464) to the 'Buch in Warenkorb' task (URI: https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-5AB935B2-C85F-40E0-9634-5E19FDB6C487).

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "4e8df28e6d9f4afe970d06522542e830" .
  ?elem bbo:name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Buch in Warenkorb")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?type)), LCASE("StartEvent")))
  ?elem a ?type .
}
LIMIT 25
